diffs.diff:
--- a/test_diff.py
+++ b/test_diff.py
@@ -0,0 +1,37 @@
+import torch

+from speechbrain.pretrained import SpectralMaskEnhancement

+import os

+

+ckpt = 'pretrained_metricgan'

+if not os.path.isdir(ckpt):

+    ckpt = '/opt/pretrained_models/metricgan-plus-voicebank'

+

+model = SpectralMaskEnhancement.from_hparams(source=ckpt, savedir=ckpt)

+device = torch.device('cuda' if torch.cuda.is_available() else 'cpu')

+model = model.to(device)

+model.train()

+

+# Dummy input

+x = torch.randn(1, 16000, device=device, requires_grad=False)

+lengths = torch.tensor([1.0], device=device)

+

+# Ensure at least one param requires grad

+for p in model.parameters():

+    p.requires_grad = True

+

+out = model.enhance_batch(x, lengths=lengths)

+if isinstance(out, tuple):

+    out = out[0]

+

+loss = out.sum()

+loss.backward()

+

+has_grad = any(p.grad is not None for p in model.parameters())

+print('Backward succeeded:', True)

+print('Any param has grad:', has_grad)

+if has_grad:

+    grad_norms = [p.grad.norm().item() for p in model.parameters() if p.grad is not None]

+    print('Max grad norm:', max(grad_norms))

+    print('Min grad norm:', min(grad_norms))

+else:

+    print('WARNING: no gradients computed!')
